sheet_name: ขยายคาน B1,B2,B3,B3X,B4,B4X,B5,B5X,B6 และขยายเสา C1
view_title: ขยายคาน (beam sections) B1-B6
schema_note: t3 independent read. Every main-bar and stirrup callout on this entire sheet uses the plain Ø (circle) symbol -- per the Gen 4 / Ø=RB rule, ALL bars on this sheet are RB (round bar, SR24) regardless of diameter, none are DB, matching prior corrected rounds (t1's original DB reading for this page was wrong and already fixed in t2). CONFIRMS the asymmetric main-bar finding directly from this fresh read: B5 and B5X both show top=2-Ø16mm / bottom=3-Ø16mm printed explicitly (not a combined 5-count) -- this is the real evidence behind Gen 4's decision to always split main_bar into top/bottom.
